## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, Android 13, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13]
- **App Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Flutter Version**: [e.g. 3.41.5]
- **Device**: [e.g. Desktop, Samsung Galaxy S21, iPhone 14]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Logs

If applicable, paste relevant logs here:

```
Paste logs here
```

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I have provided all required information
- [ ] I have included screenshots/logs if applicable
